programs.title: Rollerball (1975)
programs.desc: James Caan stars as a rollerball champ in this fast-hitting, action-packed glimpse into a dystopian future in the year 2018 where a brutal, no-holds-barred sport takes the place of war, and murder is just a part of the game! John Houseman co-stars.

programs.title: Rollerball (2002)
programs.desc: Chris Klein, LL Cool J, and Rebecca Romijn-Stamos star in this high-octane thriller as the hottest team in the brutal sport Rollerball. When they discover the league's owner (Jean Reno) will do anything for ratings, they plan to take down the sport!

programs.title: Hackers
programs.desc: Boot up for suspense and high-powered excitement with Jonny Lee Miller and Angelina Jolie when a group of hackers, the rebels of the information age, find themselves embroiled in a plot that could destroy the world's ecosystems…or their own lives.

programs.title: Anti-Trust
programs.desc: In this sizzling, fast-paced thriller, computer whiz Milo Hoffman (Ryan Phillippe) lands his dream job at a major computer company, only to learn that the C.E.O. (Tim Robbins) may employ some very unorthodox -- and very deadly --business practices.

programs.title: Miami Blues
programs.desc: Fred Ward, Alec Baldwin and Jennifer Jason Leigh star in this deliciously offbeat black comedy about a murdering thief, his streetwalker-gone-straight wife and the denture-wearing cop who is closing in on his trail. Nora Dunn co-stars.

programs.title: The Bounty
programs.desc: Anthony Hopkins delivers a brilliant portrayal as William Bligh, the sea captain who, in 1787, steered The Bounty on a 27,000-mile voyage into danger, chaos and madness, and whose first mate (Mel Gibson) lead a legendary mutiny against him..
